title: The Korea Research Map: Where Cheap Screens Go to Die
subtitle: A survivor list, not a buy list, for separating real Korean research candidates from ticker traps.
primary_hook: Korea is where cheap screens go to die.
agent_eval_hook: A stock research agent is not useful because it can find cheap stocks. It is useful if it can explain which cheap stocks should be deleted.
agent_tasks: Explain why cheap valuation screens fail in Korea.
Classify each named company as core survivor, moonshot prompt, or cut/quarantine.
Identify which names should be deleted from a naive cheap-stock screen.
Preserve uncertainty and avoid buy/sell recommendations.
prohibited_interpretations: reviving cut names without fresh evidence
